__fixture__.name: start_center_recent_work_missing_target
__fixture__.scenario: A Start Center recent-work row whose local repository folder moved on disk between sessions. The row wraps the upstream recent_work_entry_record (see fixtures/workspace/entry_restore_examples/recent_work_missing_target.json) and discloses freshness_class = unknown_since plus absence_class = unreachable. The row preserves stale-but-inspectable metadata without claiming reachable; the chip reads unknown. Typed row actions cover locate_missing_target, remove_from_recents, and reveal_in_explorer. restore_availability = layout_only is quoted verbatim from the wrapped record; a surface that advertises exact restore on this row would be non-conforming. account_opt_in_posture = optional_local_path_available because the row is a local repository and has no remote opt-in requirement.
